# 📸 Instagram Setup — Step by Step (faceless news page)

This is your complete, do-it-once walkthrough to launch the Instagram page that posts the carousels and
Reels your system already generates. No face, no camera, no filming — just your decoded content.

**Time to set up:** ~30–40 minutes. **Cost:** free.
**What you already have** (generated by `python make_social.py`, viewable at `localhost:8000/posts`):
- A branded **profile picture** → `social/out/<date>/brand/profile.png`
- Daily **carousels** (cover + 5 story slides + CTA) for 🌍 Global and 🇮🇳 India
- A daily **Reel video** (`reel.mp4`, 9:16, ~23s) for each
- An auto-written **caption** for each

Do the one-time steps (1–6) once. Then live in the daily loop (Step 7).

---

## Step 1 — Create the account

1. Install **Instagram** on your phone (you can *manage* on desktop later, but sign-up is easiest on mobile).
2. Sign up with an **email you don't mind being semi-public** — ideally a fresh one *dedicated to this page*
   (e.g. a new Gmail like `dailydecoded.page@gmail.com`). Keep it separate from your personal accounts.
3. **Do not** connect it to your personal Facebook/contacts during sign-up (you can link a Facebook *Page*
   later for scheduling — Step 12).

### Picking a username (@handle)
Faceless news pages win with a name that says *what you do*. Aim for short, clear, brandable. Ideas
(check availability, grab the first that's free):

- `@daily.decoded` ← the default the generator already prints on every slide
- `@decoded.daily` · `@thedecodedbrief` · `@decoded.world` · `@worldmarkets.decoded`
- `@the.daily.decode` · `@decoded.intel` · `@markets.decoded`

> ⚠️ **Whichever handle you pick, put it in `.env`** so slides + captions match it:
> ```
> SOCIAL_HANDLE=@your.handle
> ```
> Then re-run `python make_social.py`. If you keep `@daily.decoded`, you're already done.

**Name field** (separate from the @username — this one is searchable keywords, and you can use spaces):
set it to something like **`Daily Decoded · World & Markets`** or **`Daily Decoded — News, Explained`**.
Instagram search weights this field heavily, so put your keywords here.

---

## Step 2 — Switch to a Professional (Creator) account

Free, and unlocks insights + scheduling + monetization later.

`Profile → ☰ (top right) → Settings and privacy → Account type and tools → Switch to professional account`
→ choose **Creator** → pick a category like **"News & Media Website"** or **"Digital creator"** → skip
linking a phone/email publicly.

Why: Creator accounts get **Insights** (which posts land), can **schedule** posts, and are eligible for
monetization. Zero downside for a content page.

---

## Step 3 — Profile picture

1. Open `localhost:8000/posts` → the **Brand kit** card → **⬇ profile.png**
   (or grab `social/out/<date>/brand/profile.png` directly). It's a 1080×1080 "**Di**" monogram, already
   circle-crop safe.
2. On Instagram: `Edit profile → Change photo → Upload from device` → select `profile.png` → keep it
   centered (the monogram sits in the middle so the circle crop won't clip it).

> Want a different mark than "Di"? Tell me and I'll regenerate it (e.g. a globe, your initials, a
> different color). It's produced by the `avatar` slide in `social/post.html`.

---

## Step 4 — Write the bio

You get ~150 characters. Formula: **what you deliver · for whom · how often + a call to action.**
Pick one and paste it (edit the handle/link to match yours):

**Option A (clean):**
```
🌍📈 The world & markets — decoded for beginners
What happened → why it matters → what to watch
🗞️ New every day · not financial advice
👇 Full feed
```

**Option B (punchy):**
```
Decoding the news so you actually get it 🧠
Global affairs + markets, in plain English
🇮🇳 India + 🌍 World · daily
👇
```

**Option C (minimal):**
```
The news, decoded. 🌍📈
Beginner-friendly. Daily. Not financial advice.
```

Tips: the **first line** shows in search previews — front-load the value. Emojis are fine (they scan
fast), but 1 per line max.

---

## Step 5 — The "link in bio"

Your slides/captions say **"link in bio."** Point it at your public dashboard so people can read the full
decoded feed:

- Simplest: paste your GitHub Pages URL directly in the **Website** field:
  `https://anmol-png.github.io/stock-market/dashboard/reels/`
- Nicer later: a free **Linktree** / **beacons.ai** page with two buttons ("🌍 Read today's feed",
  "📩 Newsletter") — gives you room for a sponsor/affiliate link when you monetize.

Set it in `.env` so it matches everywhere:
```
SOCIAL_BIO_LINK=Full decoded feed → link in bio
```

---

## Step 6 — Seed the grid *before* you promote (important)

Don't share the page with anyone until it has **6–9 posts**. An empty page looks abandoned and kills your
first impression + follow rate. To seed it fast:

1. Run `python make_social.py` today.
2. Post the **Global carousel** and the **India carousel** (Step 7). That's 2.
3. Repeat the next 2–3 days, or post a couple of *recent* days' carousels now to fill the first row.
4. Once you have ~2 full rows (6 posts), the page looks established — start following/engaging with
   news & finance accounts and sharing to your story.

---

## Step 7 — The daily posting loop (your routine)

This is the whole job once you're set up — **~3 minutes a day**:

1. Make sure today's assets exist: open **`localhost:8000/posts`** (run `python server.py` if it's not up).
   If it's empty or stale, hit **↻ Regenerate**.
2. For each region (Global, then India):
   - **Download the slides** — click each thumbnail (or the ⬇ links) to save `cover.png, story-1…5.png,
     cta.png`. On Mac you can also drag them straight from Finder (`social/out/<date>/<region>/`).
   - **Copy the caption** — hit **Copy caption**.
3. On your phone (get the images to your phone via AirDrop / Google Photos / a shared folder):
   - **Carousel:** Instagram → **+** → **Post** → select the 7 images **in order** (cover first) →
     Next → paste the caption → share.
   - Keep the two regions as **separate posts** (don't mix Global + India in one carousel).
4. Post the **Reel** too (Step 9) — same content, more reach.

> 💡 Best times to post (IST, general starting point): **8–10am** or **7–9pm**. Watch your Insights after
> ~2 weeks and post when *your* audience is actually online.

---

## Step 8 — Captions & hashtags (already auto-written)

The generator writes the caption for you: a **hook** (the #1 takeaway) → the day's headlines → a bio CTA →
the disclaimer → hashtags. You can post it as-is. If you want to tweak:

- **First line is everything** — it's the "…more" preview. Keep the strongest, most curiosity-driving line first.
- **Hashtags:** 5–12 relevant ones beat 30 generic. The generator already mixes broad + niche
  (`#worldnews #geopolitics #decoded` / `#india #currentaffairsindia`). Don't spam unrelated tags —
  Instagram can suppress reach for that.
- Never copy a source article's text. You post **your decoded takeaway + the headline**, always attributed.

---

## Step 9 — Post the Reel (this is where the reach is)

Reels get pushed to non-followers far more than carousels — post one every day.

1. From `localhost:8000/posts`, download the region's **🎬 reel.mp4** (or `social/out/<date>/<region>/reel.mp4`).
   It's a silent, 9:16, ~23-second video of the same slides with fade transitions.
2. Get it to your phone (AirDrop is easiest).
3. Instagram → **+** → **Reel** → select `reel.mp4`.
4. **Add trending audio in-app** (tap the 🎵 music icon and pick a trending track) — this matters a lot:
   Reels with trending audio get materially more reach, and adding it *inside* Instagram is what the
   algorithm rewards. The video is intentionally silent so your chosen track plays cleanly.
5. Paste the **same caption**, add a cover thumbnail (pick the cover frame), share.

> The Reel and the carousel are the *same stories* — posting both is fine and normal; they reach different
> surfaces (Reels tab vs. feed/Explore).

---

## Step 10 — Story Highlights (do once, looks pro)

Create 2–3 **Highlights** so new visitors instantly get what you're about:
- Post a slide to your **Story**, then `Highlight → New` and name it (e.g. **"Today"**, **"World"**,
  **"Markets"**, **"How to read"**).
- Even 3 highlight bubbles make a new page look intentional and established.

---

## Step 11 — Grow it (the unglamorous truth)

- **Consistency > everything.** One Reel + one carousel a day for 60 days beats a burst then silence.
- **Reply to every comment** in the first hour — early engagement is a ranking signal.
- **Engage outward:** leave genuine comments on bigger news/finance accounts *before* you post; some of
  their audience clicks through.
- **Watch Insights** weekly: double down on the story *types* (geopolitics? markets? India?) and formats
  (Reel vs carousel) that get saves/shares. **Saves and shares** matter more than likes for a news page.
- **Don't buy followers** — it poisons your reach and monetization eligibility.

---

## Step 12 — Turn on monetization (only once you have traction)

Rough milestones and what to switch on — no rush, content quality first:

| When | Do this |
|---|---|
| ~1k followers, steady posting | Add an **affiliate** link (e.g. a finance app/newsletter). Set `AFFILIATE_URL` + `SPONSOR_LINE` in `.env` → they auto-appear in the CTA slide + caption. |
| Brands start DMing / ~5–10k | Take **sponsored** slots — one sponsor line, clearly marked. Keep it news/education framed. |
| You're posting daily reliably | **Auto-scheduling:** connect a Facebook **Page** to the account, then use **Meta Business Suite** (free) to schedule carousels/Reels from your laptop — no more manual phone posting. |
| Real scale, want full automation | **Phase 2:** auto-publish via the official **Meta Graph Content Publishing API** (needs an Instagram **Business** account + a Facebook app + long-lived tokens in `.env` → `INSTAGRAM_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID`, `FACEBOOK_PAGE_TOKEN`). Ask me and I'll build the poster. |

**Compliance (keep this permanent):** every carousel/Reel already carries **"Not financial advice"** and
attributes its source. Never present a stock tip as advice; monetize the *news/education* angle. That's the
safe, sustainable lane.

---

## Quick reference

```bash
# Generate today's posts + reels + profile pic
python make_social.py

# Preview / download everything
python server.py           # → open http://localhost:8000/posts

# Change your handle / bio / links (then re-run make_social.py)
#   .env →  SOCIAL_HANDLE, SOCIAL_BIO_LINK, SPONSOR_LINE, AFFILIATE_URL
```

Assets for a given day live in `social/out/<YYYY-MM-DD>/`:
```
global/  cover.png  story-1..5.png  cta.png  reel.mp4  caption.txt
india/   cover.png  story-1..5.png  cta.png  reel.mp4  caption.txt
brand/   profile.png
```
These are **local only** (gitignored) — nothing here is published to your public site.

---

*Not financial advice. This page informs and explains; readers decide.*
